Why ASTA Academy

Taught by Dr. Ashu Jain — IIT Kanpur professor, passionate educator

Real understanding over rote memorization

Dr. Ashu Jain spent over three decades teaching mathematics at the university level — including at the Indian Institute of Technology, Kanpur — one of India's most prestigious institutions. After retiring from formal academia, Dr. Jain now devotes his expertise to high school and middle school students preparing for the SAT, ACT, and other math challenges.

His teaching style emphasizes deep conceptual understanding rather than shortcuts and tricks — the kind of teaching that builds lasting skill, not just a one-time score bump.

Retired Professor · IIT Kanpur 30+ Years Teaching
